typography.guidelines: Use Poppins exclusively for headings, stat values, and key prominent text. Use Inter for all tabular data, descriptions, forms, and general body text. Prioritize maximum data density with text-xs (12px) to text-[13px] for tables.

layout.guidelines: Compact table rows are CRITICAL. Aim for 20-25 rows visible on standard laptop screen. Dashboard stat cards should be small and dense to fit all on one screen. Limit card padding to 16px (p-4) on data-heavy pages. Sidebar text/icons slightly smaller. Mobile responsive with bottom nav bar.

card.notes: Use soft shadows and white background. Avoid heavy borders.

button.primary: bg-[#E8536A] hover:bg-[#D43D54] text-white rounded-[12px] font-medium transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E8536A]/20 focus:outline-none
button.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-gray-50 text-gray-700 border border-gray-200 rounded-[12px] font-medium transition-colors

table.container: w-full overflow-auto rounded-[16px] border border-gray-100 bg-white
table.header_cell: px-3 py-2 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wider border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50
table.cell: px-3 py-1.5 text-[13px] text-gray-700 whitespace-nowrap align-middle

input.classes: h-9 w-full rounded-[10px] border border-gray-200 bg-white px-3 py-1 text-[13px] text-gray-900 placeholder:text-gray-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E8536A]/20 focus:border-[#E8536A] transition-all

sidebar.container: w-60 bg-white border-r border-gray-100 h-screen sticky top-0 flex flex-col hidden md:flex
sidebar.badge: ml-auto bg-[#E8536A] text-white text-[10px] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full min-w-[20px] text-center

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-gray-100 flex justify-around p-2 pb-safe z-50 md:hidden

logos.description: Elegant minimal wedding ring aesthetic logo placeholder

empty_states.description: Minimal workspace for empty state backgrounds

accessibility.notes: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes. Maintain WCAG AA contrast ratio. Use hover:text-white on dark backgrounds if bg changes to dark on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Poppins for Headings and Inter for Body/Tables.
Data Density is CRITICAL: Ensure Lead tables have py-1.5, text-[13px], to fit 20-25 rows on screen.
Dashboard cards must be compact. p-4 padding instead of p-6.
Cards must have rounded-[16px] and the soft shadow specified in design guidelines.
Sidebar should feature live count badges in a compact coral pill.
Implement bottom navigation strictly for mobile viewports, hiding sidebar.
Lead Status/Category colors are defined in colors.categories, use them to build consistent badges across the app.
Background page color must be #FFF5F5, cards are pure #FFFFFF.
Add data-testid attributes to all actionable elements (buttons, links, table rows).
